title: The Effect of Mindfulness-based Programs on Cognitive Function in Adults: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysis
headline: The Effect of Mindfulness-based Programs on Cognitive Function in Adults: A Systematic Review and Meta-analysi
summary: A meta-analysis / systematic review of mindfulness / meditation examined focus & attention. Mindfulness-based programs (MBPs) are increasingly utilized to improve mental health.
keyFindings: Mindfulness-based programs (MBPs) are increasingly utilized to improve mental health.
Interest in the putative effects of MBPs on cognitive function is also growing.
limitations: Limitations include the primarily unclear within-study risk of bias (only a minority of studies were considered low risk), and that statistical constraints rendered some p-values unreliable.
Pooled estimates combine heterogeneous studies; effect sizes vary by practice, population, and control condition.
The practice studied (mindfulness / meditation) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.
